Class LocalDatabase

java.lang.Object
androidx.room.RoomDatabase
edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.service.LocalDatabase
public abstract class LocalDatabase extends RoomDatabase
Room database for the Pixel Create application. Provides access to all DAOs and manages the local SQLite database containing user data, projects, layers, pixels, palettes, and related entities.
